calendar.matters:
Petitioner City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion To Enforce Administrative Subpoena
Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOHN H. GEORGE, Esq. of the Office of the City Attorney (Tel: 415-554-4223) for petitioner;
Atty. C. KEITH GREER, Esq. of Greer & Associates, A.P.C. (Tel: 858-613-6677) for respondent Community Welness America, Inc.

Hearing Re: Petitioner City And County Of San Francisco's Motion To Enforce Administrative Subpoena.

The parties inform the Court that they have reached a resolution as to this motion in which petitioner would prevail on the motion per the Court's tentative ruling, both sides would withdraw their waiver arguments, and respondent would have 30 days to respond to the discovery request.

Counsel for the petitioner is to prepare and submit an agreed-upon proposed order to the Court for review and signature.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Robin Casillas, CSR No. 14042, Email: robinc.csr@gmail.com, Tel: 714-351-7896 (302/RBU)

Petitioner City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion To Enforce Administrative Subpoena

Petitioner City And County Of San Francisco's Motion To Enforce Administrative Subpoena.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Administrative Subpoena
Off Calendar Apr-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Enforce Administrative Subpoena is Transferred to be heard on the discovery calendar, department 301, at 9:00 a.m. on the same date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Petitioner City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion To Enforce Administrative Subpoena
Off Calendar Apr-20-2022 Continued To May-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOHN H. GEORGE, Esq. of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-4223) for Petitioner City and County of San Francisco;
Atty. C. KEITH GREER, Esq. of Greer & Associates, A.P.C. (Tel: 858-613-6677) for Respondent Community Wellness America, Inc.

Hearing Re: Petitioner City And County Of San Francisco's Motion To Enforce Administrative Subpoena.

The Court posted a tentative ruling indicating a continuance on the court's own motion to 5/10/22 due to a recusal by Judge Pro Tem Peter Catalanotti.

The Court and counsel for parties discuss an alternative date for the continued hearing based on petitioner's counsel's trial conflict in another case.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification as follows:

Matter is continued on the court's own motion to May 27, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. Recusal by Judge Pro Tem Peter Catalanotti.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
